headline: AIG Appoints Christine Williams as Head of Global Client and Broker Relationships
summary: NEW YORK, July 06, 2026--American International Group, Inc. (NYSE: AIG) today announced that Christine Williams has been named Head of Global Client and Broker Relationships, effective September 1, 2026. Ms. Williams will report to Jon Hancock, Executive Vice President and Chief Executive Officer of General Insurance, AIG. She will be based in New York.

headline: HSBC Maintains Buy on American International Gr, Lowers Price Target to $88
summary: HSBC  analyst Vikram Gandhi   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $94 to $88.
